svg.aria-label: Interactive: hover any line for its exact per-turn values; click a legend chip to solo one model. Left panel: the longdoc task in loop mode — K3 collapses from 5,666 reasoning tokens on turn 1 to 1,025 on turn 2 and passes; K2.6 escalates from 5,236 to 7,815, with a false completion promise on turn 1. Right panel: generation mode under a bare Continue — K3's runs decay steeply across turns while K2.6 mostly holds its spend. Bottom: one-shot reasoning totals for the same 3-of-3 result — K2.6 spends 13,564 tokens, 2.09 times K3's 6,501.
svg.text: Same task, same loop — opposite budget curves
hover a line for exact per-turn values · click a legend chip to solo a model
K3: front-load → collapse (cheap iterations) · K2.6: hold / escalate (re-verify every turn)
One-shot reasoning totals — all 3 tasks, both models 3/3 pass
